fields.MouseSensitivity: How sensitive the game head movement is to mouse movement.
fields.ScrollWheelGrabMoveSpeed: How far items move to and from the player while being grabbed and the scroll wheel is moved 1 unit.
fields.MouseLookSpeed: How fast the mouse moves the camera.
fields.MousePanSpeed: How fast the mouse moves the camera sideways and up/down when focused on an inspector.
fields.MouseRotateSpeed: How fast the mouse can be used to rotate objects.
fields.MouseFreeformRotateSpeed: How fast the mouse can be used to free form look in 3rd person desktop mode.
